title: [WIP] Commit if last stage, or stage used in future From
body:
Currently we commit every stage when the last command happens.
We should not need to do this unless it is the last stage
or this stage is used in a future From command.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body: @nalin is that what you were thinking?

Unfortunately, we need those intermediate images to always be committed so that they can be found in the cache later, per https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/1473#issuecomment-479592881.

When we conditionalize on whether or not the stage's name is the same as stage's index, we can get an incorrect result for instructions like `COPY --from=0`, which I'd rather avoid.
